task_frame_summary: The task sounds like small governance wording cleanup but may actually be a disguised truth-facing change request.
assumed_goal: Expose whether the ask belongs to a local shadow path or to a forbidden authority path before decomposition begins.
explicit_constraints: No registry, index, or alias mutation is allowed.
No runtime or operator write is allowed.
The comparison remains local and non-authoritative.
latent_frame_risks: The benign documentation frame can hide a truth-authority expectation.
Approval language can appear under the cover of cleanup language.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Is the real target a local review aid or a truth-facing governance change?
What remains of the request if all truth mutation stays forbidden?
frame_risk_signals: cleanup framing blurs documentation and truth mutation
